[PAGE: /about]
About Deel | Global HR Solutions for Hiring & Management​ About Deel Work with the world Work with the world Millions of people working for the world’s best companies, no matter the location? Sounds like the future. We make managing a global team easy, so businesses don’t need to think twice. Trusted by 40,000+ companies from startups to enterprise The future of Global HR, a platform you can use today Deel equips teams with the tools, features, and guidance they need in a single platform to eliminate hiring and management borders. Businesses and teams can work together easier than ever and gain access to new opportunities. Onboard in seconds Get your team set up with everything they need, like contracts, equipment, and way more. Pay everyone Simplify HR for your whole team with the only global-first HR platform for any worker. Manage HR for anyone Simplify HR for your whole team with the only global-first HR platform for any worker. Stay compliant anywhere Understanding and complying with local laws abroad is complex. Deel does it all for you. How Deel came about After graduating from MIT in 2014, Co-Founders Alex Bouaziz (CEO) and Shuo Wang (CRO) noticed a trend among their friends: they couldn’t get high-paying jobs they were highly qualified for due to visa issues and local labor laws in other countries. It was an apparent problem. The duo started Deel to make a change for people everywhere by empowering companies to eliminate hiring borders—so anyone, anywhere in the world, could access new opportunities. At Deel, we’ve always been our first customer, which helps keep us poised to break new ground for our customers. As the company and team grew, we tackled more problems we faced, from onboarding employees to automating tedious processes. Now, Deel's evolved beyond just hiring to simplify every aspect of building a global team. Meet our founders Alex Bouaziz (CEO & Co-Founder) Alex Bouaziz is the CEO and co-founder of Deel, the all-in-one HR platform for global teams. Founded in 2019, Deel’s technology helps companies simplify every aspect of managing an international workforce, from culture and onboarding, to local payroll and compliance. In just under four years, the company has grown to 4,000+ team members worldwide in over 100 different countries and raised over $600 million in funding. It has 35,000-plus customers, including Shopify, Nike, and Klarna. Alex grew up in Paris and graduated from Technion and then MIT with a Masters in Civil and Environmental Engineering. Prior to Deel he co-founded investment fund Sarona Ventures. In 2020 he was featured on Forbes’ 30 Under 30 Finance list. Outside of Deel, Alex enjoys cheering on Paris Saint-Germain Football Club. Shuo Wang (CRO & Co-Founder) Shuo Wang is the Chief Revenue Officer and Co-founder of Deel, an all-in-one HR platform for global teams. Shuo drives Deel's revenue and led the company in scaling from $1-$100M ARR in under 20 months. Deel simplifies every aspect of managing an international workforce, from culture to payroll and compliance. The company has grown to 4,000+ team members across the globe in 100+ countries, raised over $600M in funding, and has 35,000+ customers including Shopify, Nike, and Klarna. Prior to Deel, Shuo co-founded Aeris Cleantec and served as CTO until its acquisition by iRobot. Shuo holds a BS degree in Mechanical Engineering and Robotics from MIT, where she met Deel's CEO, Alex Bouaziz. Shuo is passionate about inspiring more women to get involved in software development, product management, and marketing. Deel's quickly become the market leader in the Global HR space 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 Today The year it all clicked As a Y-Combinator Company, Deel started out as the first hiring and compliance product to hire and pay contractors worldwide. 40,000 Supported Businesses $17.3B processed payments 650,000+ workers hired 150 available countries We’re backed by the best in the business As one of the fastest-growing SAAS companies in the world, we’ve raised $650 million from some of the world’s most respected investors. Emilie Choi President and COO at Coinbase Tobias Lütke CEO of Shopify Anthony Schiller Co-Managing Director Green Bay Ventures Dara Khosrowshahi CEO of Uber Jeffrey Katzenberg Tech Innovator, Investor Jeff Wilke Chairman of Re:Build Emilie Choi President and COO at Coinbase Dara Khosrowshahi CEO of Uber Tobias Lütke CEO of Shopify Jeffrey Katzenberg Tech Innovator, Investor Anthony Schiller Co-Managing Director Green Bay Ventures Jeff Wilke Chairman of Re:Build Supported by the world’s top investors Find out more about Deel and our team Careers Join us, and build the future of global work Learn more Press Media resources, press kits, and the latest from Deel Learn more Resource hub Helpful articles, guides, templates, tools and more Learn more

Start here. Speak with a trusted expert FAQs How does Deel’s pricing work? Deel offers flexible pricing based on your hiring needs. Whether you’re hiring contractors, full-time employees through our Employer of Record (EOR) solution, or managing global payroll, our pricing is designed to be transparent and scalable. You only pay for the services you use—no hidden fees. Are there any hidden costs? No, Deel provides clear, upfront pricing with no surprise fees. All costs, including local compliance, payroll , and benefits administration, are included in your quoted price. How does Deel compare to hiring locally or working with a traditional payroll provider? Hiring internationally through Deel can be significantly more cost-effective than setting up entities in multiple countries or working with fragmented local providers. Deel consolidates everything—contracts, compliance, payroll, and benefits—into a single HR platform , reducing administrative overhead and unexpected costs. What’s included in the cost of an Employer of Record (EOR) hire? With Deel’s EOR service, your fee covers: Employee onboarding and local compliance Payroll processing and tax filings Benefits administration (healthcare, pensions, etc.) Ongoing HR and legal support This means you don’t have to worry about setting up a local entity or handling complex legal requirements. Do I need to sign a long-term contract? No, Deel offers flexible month-to-month pricing with no long-term commitments required. You can scale your team up or down as needed. What happens if I need to cancel? You can cancel at any time. For EOR employees, local labor laws will apply, and Deel can help ensure compliance with any required notice periods or severance obligations How does Deel handle currency exchange and international payments? Deel provides competitive exchange rates and multiple payment methods, ensuring your contractors and employees get paid efficiently in their preferred currency, with minimal fees. Can I try Deel before committing? Yes, You can explore Deel’s platform with a free demo or talk to our team to see how it fits your needs before making a decision. Deel makes growing remote and international teams effortless 150+ countries 40,000+ customers $20B+ compliantly processed global payroll 90+ NPS for enterprise customers Get a free 30-minute demo Trusted by 40,000+ companies from startups to enterprise 175 STORIES Read about real results

talent with Deel Read more How Gecko Robotics, Inc. increased efficiency with Deel Read more FAQs What solutions does Deel offer? Deel offers solutions for payroll , HR , IT, benefits, hiring, mobility, embedded infrastructure, and expert services. That means companies can manage global payroll , centralize HR, automate IT operations, offer benefits, hire internationally, handle visas and relocation, embed Deel into their own product, or get expert support for complex global operations. What is the difference between Deel Payroll and Deel HR? Deel Payroll is built for paying workers compliantly across countries, with support for payroll operations, local requirements, and workforce cost visibility. Deel HR is designed to manage worker data, workflows, and HR operations in one system for every worker. What is the difference between Deel Hire and Deel Payroll? Deel Hire helps companies find and hire talent globally. Deel Payroll helps companies pay and manage workers compliantly once they are hired. In simple terms: Hire helps you make the hire, Payroll helps you run the operation after that. What is the difference between Deel HR and Deel IT? Deel HR helps manage people, records, and HR workflows. Deel IT helps manage devices, app access, and IT support across the worker lifecycle, from onboarding to offboarding. Can Deel help us hire internationally without opening entities? Yes. Deel supports international hiring and can help companies hire globally without having to set up entities in every country, depending on the hiring model they choose. This is especially useful for teams expanding quickly into new markets. Can Deel run payroll in multiple countries? Yes. Deel Payroll is built for multi-country payroll, giving teams one place to track payroll status, costs, and local requirements across countries. Does Deel help with global benefits? Yes. Deel Benefits helps companies design benefits by country, compare options, manage enrollment, sync payroll deductions, and track costs and adoption across markets. Does Deel support visas and employee relocation? Yes. Deel Mobility helps companies manage visas, renewals, relocation, and ongoing compliance with in-house support and centralized tracking. What is Deel Embedded? Deel Embedded gives platforms and partners access to Deel’s infrastructure so they can offer global hiring, payroll, and compliance capabilities inside their own product or experience. What is Deel Services? Deel Services gives companies access to expert support for complex global operations. This includes areas like entity setup and maintenance, verifications, privacy, HR services, and equity-related support. Which Deel solution is best for global expansion? That depends on what part of expansion is slowing you down. If payroll is fragmented, Deel Payroll is the best fit. If you need to hire in new countries, Deel Hire can help. If relocation is the challenge, Deel Mobility is the right place to start. If you want broader operational support, Deel Services may be the best option. Can Deel replace multiple global vendors? For many companies, yes. Deel is built to reduce the need for separate tools and providers across payroll, HR, IT, hiring, benefits, and mobility by bringing those workflows into one platform. Is Deel built for startups or enterprise companies? Both. Deel is used by companies from startups to enterprise, which makes it suitable for businesses that need to move quickly now and scale globally over time. How does Deel help with compliance? Deel builds compliance into the workflow across hiring, payroll, contracts, mobility, and operations. The platform combines local expertise with built-in compliance logic so companies can reduce manual work and lower risk. How do I choose the right Deel solution? Start with the problem you need to solve first. If you need to pay people globally, start with Payroll. If you need one system for worker data and HR workflows, start with HR. If you need to manage devices and access, start with IT. If you need help hiring, relocating, or supporting global operations, look at Hire, Mobility, or Services.
